name: Creamy Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Beat egg yolks with sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and yellow food coloring until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared Graham cracker pie crust.
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
5. Cool completely before chilling in the refrigerator.
6. Serve chilled, garnished with whipped cream and lemon slices.
